message:
fix(core): add mut to mpsc receiver in observation runtime streaming task exit channel

The stream_exit_rx mpsc receiver needs mut to call recv().await. This
was missed in a prior commit that added the channel.

Also syncs beads issue tracker.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
